name: Quick and Eazy Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Roll the mixture into 1-inch balls.
3. Roll each ball in sugar to coat.
4. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
5. Use a fork to gently press down on each cookie, creating a crisscross pattern.
6. Bake for 6-8 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow the cookies to cool completely before eating.
